test: accountant.paymentForm.helpers derives the submit amount from the canonical payment owner
scenario: full mode, partial mode, and manual/non-proposal form
expected: full uses restProposal, partial uses allocSum, manual returns null

test: ActivePaymentForm promotes canonical server outstanding over stale current row math
scenario: server financial state reports outstanding 35 while stale current row math would differ
expected: visible rest and submit amount both become 35.00

test: ActivePaymentForm keeps partial allocation totals and residuals deterministic
expected: submit amount becomes 40.00 and allocRows remain unchanged semantically

test: ActivePaymentForm clears partial allocation state deterministically
expected: submit amount and allocRows clear without stale residue

scenario: serial and parallel Jest after accountant payment truth hardening
expected: all suites pass without new nondeterminism
